name: Double Corn Bread (Ovo Lacto)
recipeInstructions:
1. Add 4 tablespoons of lemon juice to the milk to make sour milk. Preheat the oven to 425°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine the corn meal, baking soda, baking powder, and salt.
3. In a blender container, mix together the milk, honey, vanilla extract, and egg. Blend until smooth.
4. Spray an 8-inch pan with nonstick cooking spray and place it in the oven to preheat for 3 minutes.
5. Stir the liquid mixture into the dry ingredients.
6. Toss the corn with flour and stir it into the batter.
7. Place the batter in the preheated pan and bake for 20-22 minutes, or until firm and lightly browned.
